issues.description: PipelineWebhookNotifier logs the webhookUrl in error messages (logger.error). While this is a configured URL and not a secret, in production it could be useful to redact parts of internal URLs from logs.

WebhookRestTemplateConfig creates a dedicated RestTemplate bean with hardcoded timeout values (5s connect, 10s read). These timeouts could be made configurable via PipelineProperties, though the current values are reasonable defaults.

summary: PipelineWebhookNotifier correctly implements webhook notification with graceful failure handling - errors are caught and logged but never propagate to fail the pipeline. The notifier properly handles null/empty/blank webhook URLs by no-oping. PipelineMetricsService provides comprehensive Micrometer metrics: step duration timer (tagged by step), run completed/failed counters, and token usage counters (tagged by agent). MetricsRecordingLlmPort is a clean decorator pattern for recording token metrics. Tests include both unit tests (null/empty URL, unreachable endpoint) and integration tests (WireMock webhook verification, 500 error handling). Metrics integration test verifies all 5 step durations, run completion counter, and per-agent token usage.
